data.body: Investigation (INTERMEDIATE, opus): Agent prompt at plugins/dso/agents/cross-epic-interaction-classifier.md conflates temporal/serialized file edits with semantic contention. Three issues: (1) Step 3 severity heuristic promotes any mutation to at least 'consideration' with no disjoint-region escape hatch, (2) consideration Example 3 literally teaches merge-order-only overlap → consideration, (3) Step 2 shared-resource list uses whole-file paths without sub-file-scope qualifier. Fix: add merge-order exclusion clause, replace Example 3, tighten shared-resource definition, gate ambiguity/conflict to semantic overlap only. ESCALATE: LLM-behavioral agent prompt edit — requires user approval.
